headline: How Investors Are Reacting To PTC (PTC) Winning Key Automotive Software Deals With TRD And Mazda
summary: In May 2026, PTC announced that Toyota Racing Development U.S.A. named it the Official Engine Design Software Partner and that Mazda Motor Corporation selected its Codebeamer Application Lifecycle Management solution to support software-defined vehicle development. These wins with TRD and Mazda highlight how PTC’s CAD, PLM, and ALM tools are becoming embedded in complex, high-stakes automotive engineering workflows. We’ll now examine how Mazda’s adoption of Codebeamer for software-defined...
